about.title: About This Project
about.body: This navigation app is built with Next.js App Router, next-intl, and next-themes, and is suitable for Cloudflare Pages deployment.

seo.title: ToolNext Hub | Curated Popular Sites and Online Tools
seo.description: ToolNext is a multilingual navigation hub for popular websites and custom online tools, designed for faster daily workflows.
seo.keywords: navigation hub,online tools,popular websites,productivity tools,bookmark start page,ToolNext
seo.contentTitle: Why Use ToolNext as Your Start Page
seo.contentIntro: ToolNext combines trusted sites and practical tools in one place, so you can launch work, research, and discovery faster.
seo.bullet1: Curated links across search, video, coding, social, and knowledge categories.
seo.bullet2: Multilingual experience with theme switching for global users.
seo.bullet3: Built to grow with custom tools and long-term curation.
